CustomField.description: Checks to see if the income limit on the development matches the income limit on the municipality. They should be the same.
CustomField.formula: IF(Dev_Income_Limit__c = Municipality_Name__r.Income_Limit__c , "OK" , IF(Dev_Income_Limit__r.Manual_Override__c = TRUE, "OK - MANUAL OVERRIDE", IF(Id = "a0J3m00001icjbW", "OK - NO INCOME LIMIT", "ERROR")))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checks to see if the income limit on the development matches the income limit on the municipality. They should be the same.
CustomField.label: Income Limit Check
